heading: Community development revolving loan fund for credit unions
label: 1772c–1 Community development revolving loan fund for credit unions
notes: References in TextThe Community Development Credit Union Revolving Loan Fund Transfer Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , , which is set out as a note under , The Public Health and Welfare.Pub. L. 99–609100 Stat. 3475section 9822 of Title 42Nov. 6, 1986
amendments: References in TextThe Community Development Credit Union Revolving Loan Fund Transfer Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , , which is set out as a note under , The Public Health and Welfare.Pub. L. 99–609100 Stat. 3475section 9822 of Title 42Nov. 6, 1986

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Board may exercise the authority granted to it by the Community Development Credit Union Revolving Loan Fund Transfer Act, including any additional appropriation made or earnings accrued, subject only to this section and to regulations prescribed by the Board.

children.heading: Investment
children.label: b Investment
children.text: The Board may invest any idle Fund moneys in United States Treasury securities. Any interest accrued on such securities shall become a part of the Fund.

children.heading: Loans
children.label: c Loans
children.text: The Board may require that any loans made from the Fund be matched by increased shares in the borrower credit union.

children.heading: Interest
children.label: d Interest
children.text: Interest earned by the Fund may be allocated by the Board for technical assistance to community development credit unions, subject to an appropriations Act.

children.heading: “Fund” defined
children.label: e “Fund” defined
children.text: As used in this section, the term “Fund” means the Community Development Credit Union Revolving Loan Fund.
